.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(26, 26, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(47, 47, 47) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.metadata-properties.background: rgb(35, 35, 35) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(47, 113, 85) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(28, 28, 28) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag.background: rgb(47, 113, 85) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.tag.font-family: Formular, "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

.view-content.background: rgb(38, 38, 38) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgba(128, 128, 128, 0.07) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #1a1a1a 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#1a1a1a, color-mix(in srgb, #1a1a1a 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #1a1a1a 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#1a1a1a, color-mix(in srgb, #1a1a1a 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(38, 38, 38) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(38, 38, 38) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(40, 107, 189) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(38, 38, 38) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(40, 107, 189) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(26, 26, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(26, 26, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(47, 113, 85) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: color(srgb 0.109804 0.109804 0.109804 / 0.95) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(26, 26, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input.prompt-input[type=\"text\"].background: rgb(71, 71, 71) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(77, 148, 247) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(38, 38, 38) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(59, 59, 59) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(114, 102, 48) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(59, 59, 59) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(59, 59, 59) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
